testcase.name: runScenario
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:67) at stepDefinition.PurchaseOrderStepDef.message_is_displayed_on_confirmation_page(PurchaseOrderStepDef.java:65) at ✽."THANKYOU FOR THE ORDE" message is displayed on confirmation page(file:///C:/Users/LENOVO/eclipse-workspace/cucumberflex/src/test/java/features/EdgeCase.feature:11)
